error_signature: could not parse the JSON body
title: GPT node JSON parsing error in production
symptom: In production mode, the GPT node throws an error stating 'could not parse the JSON body'. This issue does not occur in test workflows.
not_this_if: Worker instance is up to date
root_cause: The error arises when there is a version mismatch between the main n8n instance and the worker instance. If the worker instance is outdated, it may not support the JSON structure expected by the GPT node, leading to parsing errors.
fix_steps: Check the version of the worker instance
Update the worker instance to match the main n8n instance
Test the workflow again in production
agent_instruction: Ensure the worker instance is updated to the latest version and redeploy it.
